stemHtml: If Pref represents the reference pressure set by the pilot and Ps represents static pressure corrected for ISA conditions, what does a barometric altimeter indicate?

options.a: Altitude corresponding to the pressure difference between Ps and Pref set by the pilot.
options.b: Altitude corresponding to the pressure difference between Ps and Pref set by the pilot, corrected to the real atmospheric conditions.
options.d: Altitude difference between sea level and current altitude based on the GPS signal.
